  • Uses of Product in com.example.milestone.controllers

    Methods in com.example.milestone.controllers that return types with arguments of type Product
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Product>
    ProductController.createProduct(@Valid Product product, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Creates a new product through JSON API If success, product is saved to database for current user.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Product>
    ProductController.getProduct(UUID id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Returns a single product in JSON format.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Product>>
    ProductController.listProducts(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Returns all products owned by user as a JSON.
    Methods in com.example.milestone.controllers with parameters of type Product
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Product>
    ProductController.createProduct(@Valid Product product, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Creates a new product through JSON API If success, product is saved to database for current user.
    String
    ProductController.createProductSubmit(@Valid Product product, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.ui.Model model, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Handles submission of product creation form.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void>
    ProductController.updateProduct(UUID id, @Valid Product product, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Updates existing product through JSON format
    String
    ProductController.updateProductSubmit(UUID id, @Valid Product product, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.ui.Model model, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Handles edit form submission for specified product.

    ProductRepository

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Product>
    ProductRepository.findByIdAndUserId(UUID id, UUID userId)
    Finds a product via its id if owned by a specific user.
    List<Product>
    ProductRepository.findByUserId(UUID userId)
    Finds all products owned by specified user.
